title: Israelis push Netanyahu to keep fighting in Lebanon, signalling long occupation
summary_full: As Trump fumes over fighting that has impeded his peace talks with Iran, some Israelis recall the 18-year occupation of Lebanon that began in 1982 and cite “complete déjà vu.”
summary_public: As Trump fumes over fighting that has impeded his peace talks with Iran, some Israelis recall the 18-year occupation of Lebanon that began in 1982 and cite “complete déjà vu.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: impeded his peace talks with Iran
